subject: Disable plain HTTP on production interface of HV-VES
commit_message:
Disable plain HTTP on production interface of HV-VES

From security reasons disable of plain http.

Change-Id: I1374fc5f0b34f5b938c692e2bbcd2689f4efee88
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2143
Signed-off-by: kjaniak <kornel.janiak@nokia.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds
Uploaded patch set 2: Commit message was updated.

Patch Set 1:

No Builds Executed

Patch Set 2:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 2:

Gitlab Orange 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds
Topic hv-ves removed

Patch Set 2:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/4022/
Removed reviewer Piotr Jaszczyk.
Removed reviewer Pawel Biniek.
Removed reviewer Jakub Dudycz.
Removed reviewer Izabela Zawadzka.
Removed reviewer Filip Krzywka.
